target_companies.name: Amazon
target_companies.notes: Sam's current employer — 6.5+ years at AWS Startups. Scoped to Seattle + AWS/AGI orgs + Product Manager & GTM Specialist roles via the amazon.jobs search.json API (fetch_amazon_jobs in ats_clients.py). business_category filters to 'aws' and 'amazon-artificial-general-intelligence'; one search pass per role family (Product Manager, GTM Specialist); Seattle match includes multi-location roles where Seattle is one of several posted locations; capped 20 per query-family per run (dedup surfaces the rest).

target_companies.name: Google DeepMind
target_companies.notes: Google's frontier AI lab. Structured Greenhouse board (slug 'deepmind') — the high-signal Google AI target. Replaced the old 'Alphabet' web-search entry, which searched the literal holding-company name and matched ~nothing (postings are branded Google / Google DeepMind). Companion to the broader 'Google' web-search entry below; together they cover both Google and DeepMind.

target_companies.name: Google
target_companies.notes: Broader Google (Cloud AI, Labs, Workspace, YouTube). PRIMARY source = structured scrape of the server-rendered Google Careers search (ats_platform 'google_careers' -> fetch_google_careers_jobs across Sam's keyword queries; the careers backend API 404s and Brave indexes it stale). LinkedIn guest API (f_C=1441) runs as a supplement. Careers freshness via the <title> signal (live = specific title, dead = 'Jobs search'). DeepMind has its own Greenhouse entry.

target_companies.name: Databricks
target_companies.notes: Data + AI platform. Greenhouse board (slug 'databricks') — wired into the standard ATS pipeline, discoverable via /discover and daily cron. Confirmed H1B sponsor (180 LCAs filed FY26). Step-out target: only level-up roles (Head/Director/Principal/Lead with real scope) should reach Strong/Perfect — see scoring_adjustments global level note.

target_companies.name: NVIDIA
target_companies.notes: AI compute / infra. Workday CXS board (host nvidia.wd5, tenant nvidia, site NVIDIAExternalCareerSite) - wired via fetch_workday_jobs() / WORKDAY_BOARDS['nvidia'] in ats_clients.py and in daily cron (client added 2026-06-15). Confirmed H1B sponsor. Step-out target: only level-up roles (Head/Director/Principal/Lead with real scope) reach Strong/Perfect per the scoring_adjustments level rule.

target_companies.name: Snowflake
target_companies.notes: Data + AI platform (Cortex AI). Moved off Greenhouse (404 as of May 2026) onto Ashby — confirmed 2026-06-15: structured Ashby board (slug 'snowflake', jobs.ashbyhq.com/snowflake/* URLs route to _check_ashby for freshness). Wired into the standard ATS pipeline + daily cron. Confirmed H1B sponsor. Step-out target: only level-up roles (Head/Director/Principal/Lead with real scope) reach Strong/Perfect per the scoring_adjustments level rule.

target_companies.name: CoreWeave
target_companies.notes: AI/GPU cloud infrastructure (public 2025). Structured Greenhouse board (slug 'coreweave', job-boards.greenhouse.io/coreweave/jobs/{id} — id in path, no gh_jid issue). Wired into the standard ATS pipeline + daily cron 2026-06-15. Confirmed H1B sponsor. Roles cluster in Livingston NJ / New York / Bellevue WA / Sunnyvale / Remote-US. Step-out target: only level-up roles (Head/Director/Principal/Lead with real scope) reach Strong/Perfect per the scoring_adjustments level rule.
